headline: EPAM and Sinclair Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after Iran announced the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, easing international tensions and providing a much-needed boost to corporate IT spending outlooks.
